title: Timeless Storage Bed with 12 Drawers
summary: A queen bed with a moulded plywood headboard and footboard on 2x3 posts, flanked by two 75"-long storage bases holding twelve euro-slide drawers between them.
description:
The headboard and footboard are built the same way — a 3/4" plywood panel framed with 1x3 and 1x2 trim, supported on a pair of 2x3 posts, with **mitered decorative moulding applied over the panel face**. This moulding is what distinguishes this bed from a plain storage frame — cut every piece long point to long point at 45°, ends not parallel, and dry-fit the frame before nailing it home.

The two storage bases are identical, one built for each side of the bed — carcasses built from ripped 3/4" plywood strips (referred to as "1x16" throughout), backed with 1/4" plywood, on a 2x4 frame with 2x2 top rails. Each base holds six drawers on 14" euro-style bottom-corner-mount slides, for twelve drawers total across both sides.

Each drawer is a plain box — 1x6 sides and back, a 1x8 drawer face, and a 1/4" plywood bottom. **The drawer faces are listed separately from the drawer boxes on purpose** — some builders omit the fronts to save material and run with open-face drawers instead, so treat that piece as genuinely optional depending on the look you want.

materials.name: Euro-style bottom corner mount drawer slides, 14 in
Primer and paint, or stain and poly

cutList.note: Long point to long point, both ends cut at 45° off square, not parallel.
Long point to long point, both ends cut at 45° off square, not parallel.
Optional — can be omitted for open-face drawers.

steps.title: Build the headboard and footboard panels
steps.body: Frame each plywood panel with the horizontal and vertical trim, then attach to its pair of 2x3 posts.

steps.title: Add the moulding
steps.body: Miter and apply the decorative moulding to the face of each panel, dry-fitting the frame before nailing it home.

steps.title: Build the storage base carcasses
steps.body: Build two identical storage bases from the plywood strip sides and ends, backed with 1/4" plywood, on a 2x4 frame with 2x2 top rails and slat cleats.

steps.title: Install the drawer slides
steps.body: Mount six euro-style drawer slides in each base, evenly spaced.
materials: Euro-style bottom corner mount drawer slides, 14 in

steps.title: Build the drawers
steps.body: Assemble twelve drawer boxes from the sides, front/back, and plywood bottoms, then attach the drawer faces if using them.

steps.title: Assemble the bed and add hardware
steps.body: Position the storage bases on either side of the bed, attach the headboard and footboard, install the drawers, and add knobs or handles.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand all surfaces and apply primer and paint, or stain and poly.
materials: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

unresolvedImages.alt: Storage bed with moulded headboard and twelve drawers
